Article archive

Soil & Fertilizers article archive

This is the plain utility list for every published soil & fertilizers guide. For the main topic page with curated pathways, featured entry points, and broader context, use the primary hub.

Primary topic hub

Soil & Fertilizers

Soil and fertilizer questions are usually really structure and management questions. This hub organizes container media, feeding, and troubleshooting guidance around how roots, air, moisture, and nutrients behave in compact systems.

Open topic hub Jump to the archive list
4 articles

All published soil & fertilizers guides

Browse the full set of published guides in Soil & Fertilizers. This archive stays intentionally simple so it does not compete with the main hub.

Soil & Fertilizers March 21, 2026

Do Potted Herbs Need Fertilizer? Liquid vs. Slow-Release Options Explained

Potted herbs rely entirely on you for nutrients. This guide explains when to feed them, how to avoid fertilizer burn, and whether liquid or slow-release options are better.

Urban Harvest Lab Editorial Read guide
Soil & Fertilizers March 15, 2026

Best Potting Mix for Potted Herbs: What to Look For (Buyer's Guide)

Not all dirt is created equal. Whether you need an organic blend for kitchen basil or a fast-draining mix for balcony rosemary, these are the best potting soils available.

Urban Harvest Lab Editorial Read guide
Soil & Fertilizers March 15, 2026

Potting Mix vs. Raised Bed Soil for Herb Containers

Using the wrong dirt is the fastest way to kill a potted herb. This guide explains the critical difference between indoor potting mix and outdoor raised bed soil.

Urban Harvest Lab Editorial Read guide
Soil & Fertilizers February 26, 2026

Potting Mix vs Raised Bed Soil: Fix Container Yellowing

Container plants need air space, drainage, and predictable structure. That is why raised bed soil and in-ground blends usually disappoint in pots.
